signals.title: AST SpaceMobile sees New Glenn setback delaying initial commercial service into 2027
signals.summary:
AST SpaceMobile expects Blue Origin’s recent launchpad explosion will delay its direct-to-smartphone constellation by three to six months, investment bank William Blair said in an equity research note, pushing initial commercial services into the first half of 2027. 
 The post  AST SpaceMobile sees New Glenn setback delaying initial commercial service into 2027  appeared first on  SpaceNews .

signals.title: Social Security benefit cuts could average $500 a month for retirees if trust fund runs dry, report finds
signals.summary: Social Security faces a looming depletion date for its retirement trust fund. A new report looks at how much benefit cuts Americans may see to their benefits.

signals.title: Data centers can raise temperatures, energy burdens in nearby neighborhoods: ASU study

signals.title: SEC proposes rule rescinding Biden-era climate risk disclosures
signals.summary: The agency’s proposal calls the 2024 climate disclosure rules “a dramatic overreach of the Commission’s statutory authority and, independently, unsound as a matter of policy.”

signals.title: China launches test direct-to-device satellites for multiple projects
signals.summary:
China capped a busy month of launches by sending four new satellite internet test satellites into orbit with a workhorse hypergolic rocket. 
 The post  China launches test direct-to-device satellites for multiple projects  appeared first on  SpaceNews .

signals.title: South Korea goes full steam ahead on nuclear-powered submarines
signals.summary: Seoul plans to launch its first boat in the mid-2030s and commission it in “the late 2030s,” the government proclaimed.

signals.title: US military seeks cultural advisors in Somalia amid regional strikes
signals.summary: The U.S. special operations task force in Somalia is looking for contractors to advise troops on Somali politics, culture and tribal dynamics.

signals.title: Not ‘just a gun’: New SOCOM rifle allows barrel swapping and cartridge changes
signals.summary: At SOCOM’s request, the rifle features a swappable barrel, allowing operators to change between legacy cartridges and the newer 6.5mm Creedmoor.

signals.title: Army vet supports her Navy sister in tough hospital journey
signals.summary: When Navy fire controlman aegis Kayla Saska needed support during a hospital stay, her Army veteran sister Patricia Rowledge rushed to Bethesda, Maryland.

signals.title: Poland spends $16.5 billion in EU-backed loans on heavy army weapons
signals.summary: Amid political infighting over the funding mechanism, the government has  tapped local companies to make fighting vehicles, howitzers and ammunition.

signals.title: Norway becomes ninth country to sign up for French nuclear deterrence as trust in US falters
signals.summary: Meanwhile, Germany will participate in French nuclear exercises as soon as September, joining them in an observer role.
